summary: Clean invoice: correct linehaul + a valid 2-unit detention. Nothing should be flagged.
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_85/880lb -> break 5C, cwt 43.60. base=8.8*43.60=383.68 (>95 min). GLOBEX disc 0.55 -> 383.68*0.45=172.656. 2026-05-04 is ISO-W19, fuel 0.292 -> 172.656*1.292=223.07. DETENTION valid_for any, GLOBEX no free allowance: 2*42.50=85.00.

summary: Linehaul overcharge: charged 145.00, contract says 126.14.
Phantom accessorial: a 35.00 'Administrative fee' (MISC) with no contractual basis. Linehaul is correct.
derivation: LH DEN-LAX/class_50/1450lb -> break 1M, cwt 30.90. base=14.5*30.90=448.05. GLOBEX 0.55 -> 448.05*0.45=201.6225. 2026-05-19 is ISO-W21, fuel 0.301 -> 201.6225*1.301=262.31 (correct, no flag). MISC maps to no catalog code -> expected 0, impact 35.00.

summary: Unauthorized accessorial: LIFTGATE billed though both origin and dest have docks. Linehaul correct.
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_50/6200lb -> break 5M, cwt 21.10. base=62*21.10=1308.20. GLOBEX 0.55 -> 1308.20*0.45=588.69. 2026-04-29 is ISO-W18, fuel 0.285 -> 588.69*1.285=756.47 (correct). LIFTGATE valid_for no_dock_origin/no_dock_dest; both ends docked -> no basis -> expected 0, impact 95.00.

summary: Waived-charge violation: RESIDENTIAL billed to ACME though waived per master agreement. Linehaul correct.
derivation: LH CHI-ATL/class_85/620lb -> break 5C, cwt 46.40. base=6.2*46.40=287.68. ACME 0.62 -> 287.68*0.38=109.3184. 2026-05-06 is ISO-W19, fuel 0.292 -> 109.3184*1.292=141.24 (correct). RESIDENTIAL is on ACME waived list (waiver precedes validity, even though dest is residential) -> expected 0, impact 48.00.

summary: Duplicate charge: DETENTION billed twice. First copy is a valid charge; the repeat goes to human review (low confidence), not a confident assertion.
derivation: LH DEN-LAX/class_125/180lb -> break L5C, cwt 81.40. base=1.8*81.40=146.52 (>95). GLOBEX 0.55 -> 146.52*0.45=65.934. 2026-05-21 is ISO-W21, fuel 0.301 -> 65.934*1.301=85.78 (correct). A1 DETENTION 1 unit=42.50 valid (no finding). A2 repeats the same code -> duplicate, deferred to review, impact 42.50.

summary: Decoy: an expensive but fully valid 6-unit detention. Must NOT be flagged (false-positive guard).
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_125/2900lb -> break 1M, cwt 50.10. base=29*50.10=1452.90. GLOBEX 0.55 -> 1452.90*0.45=653.805. 2026-05-13 is ISO-W20, fuel 0.288 -> 653.805*1.288=842.10 (correct). DETENTION valid_for any, GLOBEX no allowance: 6*42.50=255.00 -> correctly priced, no flag.

summary: Minimum-charge floor: a light shipment whose computed linehaul falls below the 95.00 minimum, so the floor applies. Clean.
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_50/180lb -> break L5C, cwt 38.50. raw base=1.8*38.50=69.30 < 95 -> floor to 95.00. INITECH disc 0.68 -> 95.00*0.32=30.40. 2026-05-18 is ISO-W21, fuel 0.301 -> 30.40*1.301=39.55. Correct; a missing minimum-charge floor would mis-price this and is what this case guards.

summary: Weight-break error: linehaul rated one break too high (L5C instead of 5C). Engine prices the stated weight's correct break and sees the overcharge.
Fuel-surcharge error: fuel applied at 34% when the schedule for the ship week is 28.8%. Engine matches ship_date to the correct week.
Discount error: contract discount 68% under-applied at 58%. Engine recomputes the contracted discount.
Accessorial overcharge: a valid 1-unit DETENTION billed at 60.00 against a contracted rate of 42.50. Linehaul correct.
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_50/340lb -> break L5C, cwt 38.50. base=3.4*38.50=130.90; GLOBEX 0.55 -> 58.905; 2026-05-26 is ISO-W22, fuel 0.297 -> 58.905*1.297=76.40 (correct). DETENTION valid, rate 42.50*1=42.50 expected; charged 60.00 -> impact 17.50.

summary: Clean with free allowance: ACME's first detention unit is free, so a 2-unit detention bills only 1 unit. Tests the allowance arithmetic.
derivation: LH DEN-LAX/class_125/620lb -> break 5C, cwt 68.20. base=6.2*68.20=422.84; ACME 0.62 -> 160.6792; 2026-05-12 is ISO-W20, fuel 0.288 -> 160.6792*1.288=206.95 (correct). DETENTION 2 units, ACME free allowance 1 -> billable 1 -> expected 42.50; charged 42.50 -> no flag.

summary: Clean INSIDE delivery (inside_requested context valid). Exercises the inside_requested validity branch.
derivation: LH CHI-ATL/class_85/2900lb -> break 1M, cwt 39.20. base=29*39.20=1136.80; GLOBEX 0.55 -> 511.56; 2026-05-18 is ISO-W21, fuel 0.301 -> 511.56*1.301=665.54 (correct). INSIDE valid_for inside_requested (true here), rate 78.00; charged 78.00 -> no flag.

summary: Clean REDELIVERY (failed_first_attempt context valid). Exercises the failed_first_attempt validity branch.
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_125/880lb -> break 5C, cwt 59.80. base=8.8*59.80=526.24; GLOBEX 0.55 -> 236.808; 2026-04-28 is ISO-W18, fuel 0.285 -> 236.808*1.285=304.30 (correct). REDELIVERY valid_for failed_first_attempt (true here), rate 65.00; charged 65.00 -> no flag.

summary: Clean LIMITED access (limited_access_site context valid). Exercises the limited_access validity branch.
derivation: LH DEN-LAX/class_50/6200lb -> break 5M, cwt 24.70. base=62*24.70=1531.40; GLOBEX 0.55 -> 689.13; 2026-05-19 is ISO-W21, fuel 0.301 -> 689.13*1.301=896.56 (correct). LIMITED valid_for limited_access_site (dest limited_access true), rate 88.00; charged 88.00 -> no flag.

summary: Waived-charge violation, second customer/code: REDELIVERY billed to INITECH though waived, even though the failed-first-attempt context would otherwise make it valid.
derivation: LH CHI-ATL/class_125/340lb -> break L5C, cwt 75.80. base=3.4*75.80=257.72; INITECH 0.68 -> 82.4704; 2026-05-25 is ISO-W22, fuel 0.297 -> 82.4704*1.297=106.96 (correct). REDELIVERY is on INITECH waived list; waiver precedes validity -> expected 0, impact 65.00.

summary: Unauthorized accessorial (distinct from waived): RESIDENTIAL billed to GLOBEX (no waiver) but dest is not residential, so there is no valid basis.
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_85/1450lb -> break 1M, cwt 36.90. base=14.5*36.90=535.05; GLOBEX 0.55 -> 240.7725; 2026-05-13 is ISO-W20, fuel 0.288 -> 240.7725*1.288=310.11 (correct). RESIDENTIAL valid_for residential_dest; dest residential false -> no basis -> expected 0, impact 48.00.

summary: Linehaul undercharge (informational): charged below the contracted rate. Pins the engine's behavior of surfacing undercharges as a confident, negative-impact finding.
Weight-break boundary: stated weight is exactly 1000lb, the first pound of the 1M break. Clean. Guards an off-by-one in break selection.
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_50/1000lb -> 1000 is the min of break 1M (1000-4999), cwt 26.40. base=10*26.40=264.00; GLOBEX 0.55 -> 118.80; 2026-05-20 is ISO-W21, fuel 0.301 -> 118.80*1.301=154.56 (correct). A wrong break would mis-rate this.

summary: Accessorial overcharge WITH a free allowance: ACME's first detention unit is free, so a 2-unit detention overbilled at 100.00 has expected 42.50, not 85.00. Pins the allowance arithmetic on a flagged line (the clean GOLD-013 can't, since ignoring the allowance only inflates expected and hides as an undercharge).
derivation: LH CHI-DEN/class_50/880lb -> break 5C, cwt 31.20. base=8.8*31.20=274.56; ACME 0.62 -> 104.3328; 2026-05-19 is ISO-W21, fuel 0.301 -> 104.3328*1.301=135.74 (correct). DETENTION 2 units, ACME free allowance 1 -> billable 1 -> expected 42.50; charged 100.00 -> impact 57.50.
